extract: Umbreon (Japanese: ブラッキー Bracky) is a Dark-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Eevee when leveled up with high friendship during the night or with a Moon Shard in the player's Bag. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.) It is one of Eevee's final forms, the others being Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Espeon, Leafeon, Glaceon, and Sylveon. Umbreon is one of Wes's first Pokémon in Pokémon Colosseum, alongside Espeon.
